arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford future: Barcelona can afford to sign Man United outcast who becomes 'priority target'
arts.sum: Barcelona can afford to sign Marcus Rashford this month and have made the Manchester United outcast their 'priority' target, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Benfica vs Barcelona Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form Guide
arts.sum: Barcelona travel to Benfica tonight in a bid to make it six successive Champions League wins. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for both ...

The Champions League continues for FC Barcelona this week with a mouth-watering trip to Benfica. The second away trip in a row after the Getafe game, another win in Europe is the aim, and Hansi Flick has named 23 players for the tie.

arts.ttl: Como Make Bold Move for Barcelona’s Eric Garcia
arts.sum: Como's ambitious transfer strategy continues to make waves in Italian football, and fresh off the heels of securing Dele Alli on a free transfer, the Italian club have now set their sights on Barcelona defender Eric Garcia. This latest pursuit underscores Como's determination to not only secure Serie A survival but also to build a sustainable project blending experience with emerging talent. The post Como Make Bold Move for Barcelona’s Eric Garcia appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Barcelona on alert as Man City readying €100m offer for ace that Arsenal covet
arts.sum: Barcelona’s well documented financial problems are showing no signs of easing, and the Catalans are bracing themselves for a €100m bid from Man City for Raphinha. According to TeamTalk, the reigning Premier League champions are looking to do a deal for the Brazilian – who has 31 G/A this season (transfermarkt) – in the summer. arts.sum: Hansi Flick's Barcelona will be without Dani Olmo for the game vs. Benfica in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: ‘My future is here’ - Ferran Torres shoots down AC Milan rumors
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Ferran Torres shot down rumors he could move to AC Milan ahead of Tuesday’s Champions League tie with Benfica . However, Ferran told a press conference he’s only thinking of Barcelona.
